title: Translate the ≥3 exemplar descriptions into 1 target language
context: M0's definition of done requires ≥3 openly-licensed exemplar objects taken end-to-end to a plain-language source description plus at least 1 reviewed target-language translation each. This task translates the exemplar source descriptions (exemplar-001) into 1 target language, using the language-pair glossary (glossary-001) to preserve proper nouns, period terms, and plain-ness. A qualified bilingual reviewer must sign off on each translation before it is considered done.
objective: Translate the ≥3 approved exemplar source descriptions into 1 target language: apply the language-pair glossary (glossary-001) throughout; preserve all proper nouns, dates, materials, and period terms per the glossary's preserve/transliterate conventions; preserve plain-ness (do not introduce jargon or complex constructions in the target language); flag any uncertainty with UNCERTAIN tags; and obtain qualified bilingual reviewer sign-off recorded in review.yaml and the PR.
acceptanceCriteria: Each of the ≥3 exemplar descriptions from exemplar-001 is translated into the chosen target language
Glossary-001 applied throughout: glossary terms used consistently, proper nouns handled per preserve/transliterate/do-not-translate conventions
Plain-ness preserved in the target language: translations are label-sized, clear, and jargon-free for a general visitor in the target language
All agent UNCERTAIN flags captured in review.yaml agentFlags and resolved before reviewer sign-off; grounding flags result in claim review not translation of a potentially erroneous source claim
Qualified bilingual reviewer sign-off (native or near-native target language with heritage-translation competence) recorded in the PR and review.yaml; reviewer independent of translator, COI declared
Per-translation attribution/credit line and output license (source-compatible, never more permissive than source) recorded in attribution.txt for each translated description
resources: multilingual-museum-labels-exemplar-001 (source descriptions — must be approved first)
output: objects/<objectId>/descriptions/<tgt-lang>.md for each of the ≥3 objects; updated review.yaml and attribution.txt for each object
